schema.description: A page object with links to move to other pages and the list of objects.

first.description: The link to the first page.

additionalProperties.description: Map of extra retrieved fields. The values of the requested fields are always returned in an array.If no value is found an empty array is returned.

items.description: Map of extra retrieved fields. The values of the requested fields are always returned in an array.If no value is found an empty array is returned.

fields.description: Map of extra retrieved fields. The values of the requested fields are always returned in an array.If no value is found an empty array is returned.

iri.description: The IRI of the entity that this node belongs to.

score.description: The similarity score between the node and the query embeddings.

text.description: The text of a node from which the embeddings were generated.

last.description: The link to the last page.

next.description: The link to the next page or `null` if there's no page.

prev.description: The link to the previous page or `null` if there's no page.

self.description: The link to the current page.

schema.title: PageVectorSearchQueryResponseItem
